name: seed corpus: seed/postmortems/ contains exactly 12 hand-written postmortem JSONL files
command: count=$(find "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/seed/postmortems" -name "*.jsonl" 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "$count" = "12" ] && echo "ok count=$count" 1>&2 || { echo "FAIL count=$count expected 12" 1>&2; exit 1; }
